stories.headline: Amazon Rolls Out Claude Code and Codex to All Employees
stories.headlineEn: Amazon Rolls Out Claude Code and Codex to All Employees
stories.headlineZh: 亚马逊向全体员工推行Claude Code和Codex
stories.lead: Amazon is formally adopting Anthropic's Claude Code and OpenAI's Codex across its corporate workforce, expanding beyond its internal Kiro platform. The move follows employee demand and leverages Amazon's multibillion-dollar partnerships with the two AI labs, aiming to enhance coding capabilities.
stories.leadEn: Amazon is formally adopting Anthropic's Claude Code and OpenAI's Codex across its corporate workforce, expanding beyond its internal Kiro platform. The move follows employee demand and leverages Amazon's multibillion-dollar partnerships with the two AI labs, aiming to enhance coding capabilities.
stories.leadZh: 亚马逊正式在全公司范围内采用Anthropic的Claude Code和OpenAI的Codex，将其AI编程工具从内部的Kiro平台向外扩展。此举回应了员工的诉求，并利用了亚马逊与两大AI实验室数十亿美元的合作关系，旨在提升编程能力。

timeline.heading: Employees Push for Claude Code Access
timeline.summary: Amazon corporate employees voice strong demand for access to Claude Code, an AI coding assistant, as an alternative to the in-house Kiro tool.

timeline.heading: Amazon Formally Adopts Claude Code and Codex
timeline.summary: VP Jim Haughwout announces company-wide rollout of Anthropic's Claude Code and OpenAI's Codex, addressing internal complaints and expanding AI coding tools beyond Kiro.

timelineEn.heading: Employees Push for Claude Code Access
timelineEn.summary: Amazon corporate employees voice strong demand for access to Claude Code, an AI coding assistant, as an alternative to the in-house Kiro tool.

timelineEn.heading: Amazon Formally Adopts Claude Code and Codex
timelineEn.summary: VP Jim Haughwout announces company-wide rollout of Anthropic's Claude Code and OpenAI's Codex, addressing internal complaints and expanding AI coding tools beyond Kiro.

timelineZh.heading: 员工要求使用Claude Code
timelineZh.summary: 亚马逊员工强烈要求获得Claude Code这一AI编程助手的访问权限，作为内部Kiro工具的替代选择。

timelineZh.heading: 亚马逊正式采用Claude Code和Codex
timelineZh.summary: 副总裁Jim Haughwout宣布全公司推行Anthropic的Claude Code和OpenAI的Codex，回应内部不满，并将AI编码工具扩展到Kiro之外。

keyDetails: Amazon is rolling out Anthropic's Claude Code and OpenAI's Codex to all corporate employees, going beyond its in-house Kiro tool.
The decision follows internal employee pushback and requests for access to Claude Code.
Amazon has invested billions in both Anthropic and OpenAI, deepening its ties with the AI labs.
The move aims to improve coding capabilities and productivity across the company.
keyDetailsEn: Amazon is rolling out Anthropic's Claude Code and OpenAI's Codex to all corporate employees, going beyond its in-house Kiro tool.
The decision follows internal employee pushback and requests for access to Claude Code.
Amazon has invested billions in both Anthropic and OpenAI, deepening its ties with the AI labs.
The move aims to improve coding capabilities and productivity across the company.
keyDetailsZh: 亚马逊正在向所有企业员工推出Anthropic的Claude Code和OpenAI的Codex，超越了内部Kiro工具。
该决定是在内部员工强烈要求使用Claude Code之后做出的。
亚马逊已向Anthropic和OpenAI投资了数十亿美元，深化了与这些AI实验室的联系。
此举旨在提升全公司的编码能力和生产效率。

stories.headline: Spirit Airlines Folds, But Low-Cost Air Travel Endures
stories.headlineEn: Spirit Airlines Folds, But Low-Cost Air Travel Endures
stories.headlineZh: 精神航空歇业，低成本出行模式犹存
stories.lead: Spirit Airlines has ceased independent operations, marking the end of America's largest ultra-low-cost carrier, as intense competition and high costs forced a restructuring. However, the underlying demand for no-frills, bargain airfares remains strong, with other low-cost carriers and legacy airlines expanding basic economy offerings to fill the void.
stories.leadEn: Spirit Airlines has ceased independent operations, marking the end of America's largest ultra-low-cost carrier, as intense competition and high costs forced a restructuring. However, the underlying demand for no-frills, bargain airfares remains strong, with other low-cost carriers and legacy airlines expanding basic economy offerings to fill the void.
stories.leadZh: 美国最大超低成本航空精神航空已停止独立运营，激烈的竞争和高昂的成本迫使其进行重组。然而，对高性价比机票的潜在需求依然强劲，其他低成本航空和传统航司正扩大基础经济舱服务以填补空白。

timeline.heading: Spirit Airlines Files for Chapter 11
timeline.summary: Spirit Airlines files for bankruptcy protection, citing an inability to restructure debt amid fierce price wars and rising labor costs.

timeline.heading: Operations Cease, Assets Sold
timeline.summary: Spirit ceases flying under its own brand; routes and aircraft are absorbed by rivals or liquidated. Discount fares persist through other carriers.

timelineEn.heading: Spirit Airlines Files for Chapter 11
timelineEn.summary: Spirit Airlines files for bankruptcy protection, citing an inability to restructure debt amid fierce price wars and rising labor costs.

timelineEn.heading: Operations Cease, Assets Sold
timelineEn.summary: Spirit ceases flying under its own brand; routes and aircraft are absorbed by rivals or liquidated. Discount fares persist through other carriers.

timelineZh.heading: 精神航空申请破产保护
timelineZh.summary: 精神航空因在激烈的价格战和劳动力成本上升中无法重组债务，正式申请第11章破产保护。

timelineZh.heading: 运营终止，资产遭出售
timelineZh.summary: 精神航空自有品牌航班停飞；航线和机队被竞争对手吸收或清算。其他航司仍提供低价机票。

keyDetails: Spirit Airlines, once America's leading ultra-low-cost carrier, ceased independent operations after failing to secure a merger or restructuring deal.
The collapse was driven by intense price competition, high debt levels, and rising fuel and labor costs that eroded its already thin margins.
Consumer appetite for bargain fares remains strong, with legacy carriers expanding basic economy seats and ULCCs like Frontier and Allegiant maintaining aggressive pricing.
Industry analysts expect further consolidation in the U.S. airline sector, potentially reducing the number of ultra-low-cost players but not eliminating the no-frills model.
keyDetailsEn: Spirit Airlines, once America's leading ultra-low-cost carrier, ceased independent operations after failing to secure a merger or restructuring deal.
The collapse was driven by intense price competition, high debt levels, and rising fuel and labor costs that eroded its already thin margins.
Consumer appetite for bargain fares remains strong, with legacy carriers expanding basic economy seats and ULCCs like Frontier and Allegiant maintaining aggressive pricing.
Industry analysts expect further consolidation in the U.S. airline sector, potentially reducing the number of ultra-low-cost players but not eliminating the no-frills model.
keyDetailsZh: 曾是美国领先的超低成本航空精神航空，因未能达成合并或重组交易而停止独立运营。
激烈的价格竞争、高额债务以及燃料和劳动力成本上升，侵蚀了其本就微薄的利润，导致其崩溃。
消费者对廉价机票的需求依然旺盛，传统航司扩大了基础经济舱座位，而前沿航空和忠实航空等超低成本航司仍保持激进定价。
行业分析师预计美国航空业将进一步整合，可能减少超低成本航司数量，但不会淘汰极简服务模式。

perspectives.what: Travelers who relied on Spirit's $9 fare deals now face fewer options for deep discounts, though basic economy expansion offers some alternatives at higher price points.
perspectives.why: Concern over reduced competition and potential fare increases on leisure routes.

perspectives.what: Frontier, Allegiant, and Breeze Airways see an opportunity to capture Spirit's market share and may use the consolidation to raise average fares while still undercutting legacies.
perspectives.why: Profit recovery after years of destructive price wars.

perspectivesEn.what: Travelers who relied on Spirit's $9 fare deals now face fewer options for deep discounts, though basic economy expansion offers some alternatives at higher price points.
perspectivesEn.why: Concern over reduced competition and potential fare increases on leisure routes.

perspectivesZh.why: 担心竞争减少及休闲航线票价可能上涨。

perspectivesZh.what: 前沿航空、忠实航空和清风航空视此为契机，抢占精神航空的市场份额，并可能利用行业整合提高平均票价，同时仍低于传统航司。
perspectivesZh.why: 在多年破坏性价格战后恢复盈利。

sources.name: MarketWatch
sources.take: 精神航空的退出凸显了超低成本模式的可行性及其挑战。
sources.takeEn: Spirit Airlines' exit underscores the viability but challenges of the ultra-low-cost model.
sources.takeZh: 精神航空的退出凸显了超低成本模式的可行性及其挑战。

secondaryEffects.analysis: Legacy carriers may benefit from reduced capacity and higher fares, while remaining low-cost carriers could see stock gains as they pick up market share and potentially raise yields.
secondaryEffects.movements: Frontier (FRNT) and Allegiant (ALGT) shares rose ~5% in after-hours trading; Delta (DAL) and United (UAL) edged up 1-2%.
secondaryEffects.evidence: Market reaction following Spirit's bankruptcy announcement, with investors betting on improved industry pricing power.

secondaryEffectsEn.analysis: Legacy carriers may benefit from reduced capacity and higher fares, while remaining low-cost carriers could see stock gains as they pick up market share and potentially raise yields.

secondaryEffectsEn.evidence: Market reaction following Spirit's bankruptcy announcement, with investors betting on improved industry pricing power.

secondaryEffectsZh.analysis: 传统航司或因运力减少和票价上涨而受益，而剩余低成本航司股价则因市场份额提升和潜在收益增长而上涨。
secondaryEffectsZh.movements: 前沿航空和忠实航空股价盘后上涨约5%；达美航空和美联航微涨1-2%。
secondaryEffectsZh.evidence: 精神航空破产公告后的市场反应，投资者押注行业定价能力改善。

financeJargon.explanation: An airline that strips down fares to the bare minimum, charging extra for everything from carry-on bags to seat assignments, targeting highly price-sensitive travelers.
A no-frills fare class introduced by legacy airlines that competes directly with ULCCs, offering only a seat and a small personal item, with limited or no changes allowed.
The percentage of available seats filled with paying passengers; a critical metric for airline profitability, as fixed costs are high.

financeJargonEn.explanation: An airline that strips down fares to the bare minimum, charging extra for everything from carry-on bags to seat assignments, targeting highly price-sensitive travelers.

financeJargonZh.explanation: 将票价压缩至极低的航空公司模式，对随身行李、选座等所有额外服务收费，瞄准对价格极其敏感的旅客。
传统航司推出的简朴服务票价等级，与超低成本航空直接竞争，仅提供座位和小件个人物品，限制或禁止更改。
付费旅客占可用座位的百分比；是衡量航空公司盈利能力的关键指标，因固定成本较高。

tradingSignals.rationale: Frontier is the most direct beneficiary of Spirit's exit, poised to capture market share and potentially raise fares on overlapping routes.
Delta's large basic economy segment may see increased demand, but broader network and corporate exposure dilute the impact of a single ULCC failure.
Industry consolidation reduces seat supply, typically leading to higher yields and improved margins for survivors.

tradingSignalsEn.rationale: Frontier is the most direct beneficiary of Spirit's exit, poised to capture market share and potentially raise fares on overlapping routes.
Delta's large basic economy segment may see increased demand, but broader network and corporate exposure dilute the impact of a single ULCC failure.

tradingSignalsZh.rationale: 前沿航空是精神航空退出最直接的受益者，有望抢占市场份额并可能在重叠航线上提价。
达美航空庞大的基础经济舱业务需求可能增加，但其广泛的航线网络和商务客户占比稀释了单一超低成本航司倒闭的影响。
行业整合减少了座位供应，通常会提升幸存者的单位收益并改善利润。

stories.headline: Pinterest Surges 17% After Q1 Earnings Beat, Strong AI-Fueled Guidance
stories.headlineEn: Pinterest Surges 17% After Q1 Earnings Beat, Strong AI-Fueled Guidance
stories.headlineZh: Pinterest第一季度业绩超预期，AI战略指引强劲，股价飙升17%
stories.lead: Pinterest stock jumped 17% in extended trading Monday after the company reported better-than-expected first-quarter earnings and issued an optimistic forecast. The results reflect a successful pivot toward artificial intelligence, supported by a 15% workforce reduction and office space cuts in January to free up resources for AI development.
stories.leadEn: Pinterest stock jumped 17% in extended trading Monday after the company reported better-than-expected first-quarter earnings and issued an optimistic forecast. The results reflect a successful pivot toward artificial intelligence, supported by a 15% workforce reduction and office space cuts in January to free up resources for AI development.
stories.leadZh: Pinterest周一盘后股价飙升17%，此前该公司公布的第一季度业绩超出预期，并发布了乐观的业绩指引。这一成绩反映出其向人工智能转型的成功，今年1月该公司削减了15%的员工和办公空间，为AI发展腾出资源。

stories.headlineZh: GameStop出价560亿美元竞购eBay，资金谜题待解
stories.lead: GameStop has made an unsolicited $56 billion bid to acquire e-commerce platform eBay, a move that would see the struggling video game retailer swallow a company nearly three times its size. The proposal comes as GameStop grapples with declining revenues and ongoing store closures, raising immediate questions about how it would finance such a deal.

stories.lead: In the first week of the Musk v. Altman trial, OpenAI President Greg Brockman confirmed the company is exploring an IPO and his personal stake is valued at nearly $30 billion. The disclosures add a financial dimension to the legal battle over OpenAI’s structure and mission.
stories.leadEn: In the first week of the Musk v. Altman trial, OpenAI President Greg Brockman confirmed the company is exploring an IPO and his personal stake is valued at nearly $30 billion. Earlier, Elon Musk testified he was deceived into backing OpenAI, warned AI could destroy humanity, and admitted his xAI startup distills OpenAI’s models. The disclosures add a financial dimension to the legal battle over OpenAI’s structure and mission.
stories.leadZh: 在马斯克诉奥特曼案的第一周，OpenAI总裁格雷格·布罗克曼出庭作证，确认公司正在探索首次公开募股，其个人持股价值近300亿美元。此前，马斯克作证称自己受骗资助了OpenAI，警告人工智能可能毁灭人类，并承认其xAI公司蒸馏了OpenAI的模型。这些披露为这场围绕OpenAI架构与使命的法律大战增添了金融色彩。

timeline.heading: Musk Testifies: Duped, Warns of AI Apocalypse, xAI Distills OpenAI
timeline.summary: Elon Musk took the stand, claiming Sam Altman and Greg Brockman deceived him into funding OpenAI. He warned artificial intelligence could endanger humanity and revealed that xAI distills outputs from OpenAI’s models.

timeline.heading: Brockman Confirms OpenAI IPO Exploration, $30 Billion Personal Stake
timeline.summary: OpenAI President Greg Brockman testified that the company is actively exploring an initial public offering and disclosed his stake is worth nearly $30 billion, fueling speculation about the AI giant’s valuation and strategy.

stories.headline: Canary Trap Exposes Canadian Election Database Leak
stories.headlineEn: Canary Trap Exposes Canadian Election Database Leak
stories.headlineZh: 加拿大用‘金丝雀陷阱’揪出选民数据库泄密者
stories.lead: Elections Canada deployed a canary trap—inserting fake voter records—to identify a political operative who leaked a database containing the names and addresses of all eligible voters. The leak highlights significant privacy vulnerabilities and insider threats within electoral systems.
stories.leadEn: Elections Canada deployed a canary trap—inserting fake voter records—to identify a political operative who leaked a database containing the names and addresses of all eligible voters. The leak highlights significant privacy vulnerabilities and insider threats within electoral systems.
stories.leadZh: 加拿大选举机构通过植入虚假选民记录作为“金丝雀陷阱”，成功揪出了一名政治活动人士，此人泄露了包含所有合格选民姓名和地址的数据库。这起事件凸显了选举系统内部的重大隐私漏洞和内部威胁。

stories.headline: Democrats Vow to Fight Back After Supreme Court Redistricting Ruling
stories.headlineEn: Democrats Vow to Fight Back After Supreme Court Redistricting Ruling
stories.headlineZh: 最高法院裁决后民主党誓言反击 杰弗里斯推动纽约重划选区
stories.lead: Democrats are pledging a vigorous response after the Supreme Court struck down a Louisiana congressional district designed to empower Black voters. House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries is spearheading an effort to redraw New York's map, potentially offsetting the ruling's impact as multiple states reconsider their districts.

timeline.heading: Supreme Court Strikes Down Majority-Black Louisiana District
timeline.summary: The U.S. Supreme Court eliminates a Louisiana House district that was designed to have a majority of Black voters, a move critics say weakens the Voting Rights Act.

timeline.heading: Jeffries Leads Democratic Push to Redraw New York Maps
timeline.summary: House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries ramps up efforts to redistrict New York, aiming to create more favorable districts for Democrats in response to the court's decision.

timeline.heading: Multiple States Reassess District Maps After Ruling
timeline.summary: The Supreme Court's ruling prompts lawmakers across the country to re-evaluate redistricting plans, raising the possibility of widespread changes ahead of upcoming elections.

Multiple states are reconsidering their district boundaries in light of the decision, potentially reshaping the U.S. House balance of power.

stories.headline: Half of US Young Children Live in Childcare Deserts, Report Finds
stories.headlineEn: Half of US Young Children Live in Childcare Deserts, Report Finds
stories.headlineZh: 半数美国幼童身处“育儿荒漠”，新报告敲响警钟
stories.lead: A new analysis reveals that roughly half of young children in the United States live in areas with severely limited licensed childcare, underscoring a deepening crisis for working families. The report identifies Alaska, Hawaii, Idaho and Kansas as states where access is especially dire, and stresses that both supply shortages and affordability barriers must be tackled.
stories.leadEn: A new analysis reveals that roughly half of young children in the United States live in areas with severely limited licensed childcare, underscoring a deepening crisis for working families. The report identifies Alaska, Hawaii, Idaho and Kansas as states where access is especially dire, and stresses that both supply shortages and affordability barriers must be tackled.
stories.leadZh: 最新分析显示，美国约半数幼儿生活在持证托儿服务严重匮乏的地区，这凸显了工薪家庭面临的日益严重的育儿危机。报告指出，阿拉斯加、夏威夷、爱达荷和堪萨斯等州的情况尤为严峻，并强调必须同时解决供给不足和负担能力不足两大障碍。

timeline.heading: New Report Maps Extent of US Childcare Deserts
timeline.summary: A comprehensive analysis finds that nearly 50% of American children under five live in a childcare desert, with families in several Western and Midwestern states facing the greatest difficulty in finding licensed care.

timelineEn.heading: New Report Maps Extent of US Childcare Deserts
timelineEn.summary: A comprehensive analysis finds that nearly 50% of American children under five live in a childcare desert, with families in several Western and Midwestern states facing the greatest difficulty in finding licensed care.

timelineZh.heading: 新报告绘制美国“育儿荒漠”分布图
timelineZh.summary: 一项全面分析发现，近五成美国5岁以下儿童生活在持证托儿服务极度匮乏的“育儿荒漠”中，其中西部和中西部多个州的家庭最难找到持证托儿机构。

keyDetails: About half of young children in the US live in a childcare desert, defined as an area with more than three children for every licensed childcare slot.
Alaska, Hawaii, Idaho, and Kansas are among the states where it is hardest to access licensed childcare.
Affordability is as significant a barrier as availability, with many families priced out of existing options.
Report author says both supply-side solutions (more providers) and demand-side support (subsidies) are needed.
keyDetailsEn: About half of young children in the US live in a childcare desert, defined as an area with more than three children for every licensed childcare slot.
Alaska, Hawaii, Idaho, and Kansas are among the states where it is hardest to access licensed childcare.
Affordability is as significant a barrier as availability, with many families priced out of existing options.
Report author says both supply-side solutions (more providers) and demand-side support (subsidies) are needed.
keyDetailsZh: 全美约半数幼儿生活在“育儿荒漠”，即每三个以上幼儿才对应一个持证托育名额的地区。
阿拉斯加、夏威夷、爱达荷和堪萨斯等州是持证托儿服务最难获取的地区之一。
负担能力与可获得性同等重要，许多家庭因费用高昂而被迫放弃现有选择。
报告作者指出，既需要增加服务供给，也需要通过补贴等方式支持家庭需求。

keyDetails: Palantir reported better-than-expected revenue and profit for Q1 2026.
Revenue grew 85% year-over-year, the fastest expansion since its 2020 direct listing.
Growth was primarily driven by increased sales to U.S. government agencies.
The beat highlights strong demand for Palantir's data analytics and AI platforms.

stories.headline: Pirro Abandons Appeal of Powell Subpoenas in Fed Investigation
stories.headlineEn: Pirro Abandons Appeal of Powell Subpoenas in Fed Investigation

stories.lead: Pirro has decided not to appeal subpoenas served to Fed Chair Jerome Powell, a move unlikely to force Powell's resignation. The decision marks a key development in the ongoing investigation into the Federal Reserve.

stories.headline: Suspected Hantavirus Outbreak Kills Three on Cruise Ship, Stranding 149
stories.headlineEn: Suspected Hantavirus Outbreak Kills Three on Cruise Ship, Stranding 149
stories.headlineZh: 游轮爆发疑似汉坦病毒 三人死亡149人隔离
stories.lead: A suspected hantavirus outbreak aboard the MV Hondius cruise ship has killed three passengers and left three seriously ill, prompting Cape Verde to block the vessel from docking. The World Health Organization is investigating, with at least one case confirmed.
stories.leadEn: A suspected hantavirus outbreak aboard the MV Hondius cruise ship has killed three passengers and left three seriously ill, prompting Cape Verde to block the vessel from docking. The World Health Organization is investigating, with at least one case confirmed.
stories.leadZh: 一艘名为MV Hondius的游轮上爆发疑似汉坦病毒疫情，导致三名乘客死亡、三人病重，佛得角拒绝其靠岸。世界卫生组织正在调查，至少已有一例确诊病例。

timeline.heading: Deaths reported and hantavirus suspected
timeline.summary: Three passengers die on MV Hondius, including a Dutch couple, and three others fall ill. WHO and South African health department report suspected hantavirus, with one case confirmed.

timeline.heading: Ship blocked from docking, evacuation planned
timeline.summary: Cape Verde refuses entry to MV Hondius to protect public health. Medics prepare to evacuate two critically ill passengers as 149 people remain isolated onboard.

timelineEn.summary: Three passengers die on MV Hondius, including a Dutch couple, and three others fall ill. WHO and South African health department report suspected hantavirus, with one case confirmed.

timelineEn.summary: Cape Verde refuses entry to MV Hondius to protect public health. Medics prepare to evacuate two critically ill passengers as 149 people remain isolated onboard.

timelineZh.heading: 报告死亡病例，疑似汉坦病毒

timelineZh.heading: 船只被禁止靠岸，计划紧急撤离
timelineZh.summary: 佛得角为保护公共卫生，拒绝MV Hondius入境。医护人员正紧急准备撤离两名重症患者，船上149名人员继续隔离。

keyDetails: Three passengers have died: a Dutch husband and wife and a German national (BBC).
Three others are seriously ill, and at least one case of hantavirus has been confirmed by the WHO (Guardian).
The MV Hondius departed Argentina in March with 149 passengers and crew from 23 countries.
Cape Verde blocked the ship from docking, and efforts are underway to evacuate two critically ill individuals (Guardian).

MV Hondius号3月从阿根廷启航，载有来自23个国家的149名乘客和船员。
佛得角禁止该船靠岸，正努力撤离两名危重患者（《卫报》）。

stories.headline: GameStop Submits $56 Billion Takeover Bid for eBay
stories.headlineEn: GameStop Submits $56 Billion Takeover Bid for eBay
stories.headlineZh: GameStop出价560亿美元收购eBay
stories.lead: GameStop has made an unsolicited $56 billion bid to acquire eBay, CEO Ryan Cohen’s bold move to turn the online marketplace into a “legit competitor to Amazon.” eBay said it will carefully review the offer, though it had no prior discussions with the video game retailer. The deal would be funded by GameStop’s $9.4 billion cash reserves and third-party debt financing.
stories.leadEn: GameStop has made an unsolicited $56 billion bid to acquire eBay, CEO Ryan Cohen’s bold move to turn the online marketplace into a “legit competitor to Amazon.” eBay said it will carefully review the offer, though it had no prior discussions with the video game retailer. The deal would be funded by GameStop’s $9.4 billion cash reserves and third-party debt financing.
stories.leadZh: GameStop向eBay发出了一份价值560亿美元的主动收购要约，首席执行官瑞安·科恩希望借此将这家在线市集打造成“亚马逊的合法竞争者”。eBay表示将仔细评估这一邀约，但此前并未与这家游戏零售商进行过任何沟通。该交易将由GameStop的94亿美元现金储备及第三方债务融资共同支持。

timeline.heading: Reports Emerge of GameStop’s Planned eBay Bid
timeline.summary: Engadget cites The Wall Street Journal reporting that GameStop was preparing an offer to buy eBay, which could come as soon as May.

timeline.heading: GameStop Formally Submits $56 Billion Offer
timeline.summary: GameStop announces a $55.5–$56 billion all-cash and debt buyout proposal for eBay, with CEO Ryan Cohen outlining his vision to create an Amazon rival. eBay confirms receipt of the unsolicited bid and pledges a careful review.

timelineEn.heading: Reports Emerge of GameStop’s Planned eBay Bid
timelineEn.summary: Engadget cites The Wall Street Journal reporting that GameStop was preparing an offer to buy eBay, which could come as soon as May.

timelineEn.heading: GameStop Formally Submits $56 Billion Offer
timelineEn.summary: GameStop announces a $55.5–$56 billion all-cash and debt buyout proposal for eBay, with CEO Ryan Cohen outlining his vision to create an Amazon rival. eBay confirms receipt of the unsolicited bid and pledges a careful review.

timelineZh.heading: 消息称GameStop拟收购eBay
timelineZh.summary: Engadget援引《华尔街日报》报道，GameStop正筹备收购eBay的报价，最早可能于5月发出。

timelineZh.heading: GameStop正式发出560亿美元收购要约
timelineZh.summary: GameStop宣布以现金加债务形式提出555亿至560亿美元的收购方案，CEO科恩称要将eBay打造成亚马逊的对手。eBay确认收到主动要约并将仔细评估。

keyDetails: GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen aims to transform eBay into a “legit competitor to Amazon.”
The takeover bid is valued between $55.5 billion and $56 billion, to be financed with $9.4 billion of GameStop’s cash and up to $20 billion in debt from TD Securities.
eBay disclosed that it had “no discussions with or outreach from GameStop” prior to receiving the unsolicited proposal.
The bid aligns with GameStop’s broader turnaround strategy, following its meme-stock notoriety and pivot to digital and e-commerce.
keyDetailsEn: GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen aims to transform eBay into a “legit competitor to Amazon.”
The takeover bid is valued between $55.5 billion and $56 billion, to be financed with $9.4 billion of GameStop’s cash and up to $20 billion in debt from TD Securities.
eBay disclosed that it had “no discussions with or outreach from GameStop” prior to receiving the unsolicited proposal.
The bid aligns with GameStop’s broader turnaround strategy, following its meme-stock notoriety and pivot to digital and e-commerce.
keyDetailsZh: GameStop首席执行官瑞安·科恩欲将eBay打造成“亚马逊的合法竞争对手”。
收购报价介于555亿至560亿美元之间，资金来源包括GameStop持有的94亿美元现金及TD证券提供的最高200亿美元债务融资。
eBay透露，在收到要约前“未与GameStop进行任何讨论或接触”。
此次收购与GameStop整体转型战略一致，该公司自成为散户抱团股后持续向数字与电子商务领域倾斜。

perspectives.what: Sees the acquisition as a way to transform a legacy marketplace into an Amazon rival, leveraging eBay’s seller ecosystem and GameStop’s retail footprint.
perspectives.why: Growth and diversification beyond GameStop’s struggling physical game stores.

perspectives.what: Remains cautious, highlighting the unsolicited nature and lack of prior talks; will “carefully review” the offer while likely considering defensive measures.
perspectives.why: Fear of undervaluation, cultural clash, and the risk of a debt-heavy deal burdening the combined entity.

perspectives.what: Skeptical about the deal’s strategic logic and financing, given GameStop’s relatively small cash base and the massive debt required.
perspectives.why: Past meme-stock volatility and the uncertain path to competing with Amazon.

financeJargon.explanation: An acquisition offer made without the target company’s prior request or consent, often seen as hostile if rejected.
Debt or equity provided by banks or institutional investors to fund a merger, distinct from using the acquirer’s own cash reserves.
A financial statement showing a company’s assets, liabilities, and shareholder equity at a specific point in time.
An offer by one company to purchase another, either through cash, stock, or a combination, requiring shareholder and regulatory approval.

由银行或机构投资者提供的债务或股权资金，用于并购交易，区别于收购方自有现金。
反映公司在某一时点资产、负债和股东权益的财务状况报表。
一家公司为购买另一家公司而提出的具体条件，涉及现金、股票或两者结合，且须经股东及监管批准。

tradingSignals.rationale: Takeover bids typically lead to a share price increase from the premium offered, especially if speculators expect a higher counterbid or competitive auction.
While the bold move may attract speculative buying, the heavy debt requirement and integration risks could cap upside or increase short interest.
The near-term threat is limited, but a combined entity could become a viable competitor in online retail, marginally negative for long-term dominance assumptions.

stories.headline: Apple Rolls Out iOS 26.5 RC and Multiple OS Updates with Privacy Boosts
stories.headlineEn: Apple Rolls Out iOS 26.5 RC and Multiple OS Updates with Privacy Boosts
stories.headlineZh: 苹果发布iOS 26.5 RC等多系统更新，强化隐私与跨平台体验
stories.lead: Apple today released a suite of operating system updates, including iOS 26.5 RC, watchOS 26.5 RC, macOS 26.5 RC, visionOS 26.5 RC, and a formal release of iOS 18.7.9. The updates bring notable features such as RCS end-to-end encryption testing, EU support for third-party wearables, and the annual Pride-themed wallpapers and watch faces.
stories.leadEn: Apple today released a suite of operating system updates, including iOS 26.5 RC, watchOS 26.5 RC, macOS 26.5 RC, visionOS 26.5 RC, and a formal release of iOS 18.7.9. The updates bring notable features such as RCS end-to-end encryption testing, EU support for third-party wearables, and the annual Pride-themed wallpapers and watch faces.
stories.leadZh: 苹果今日集中推送了iOS 26.5 RC、watchOS 26.5 RC、macOS 26.5 RC、visionOS 26.5 RC以及iOS 18.7.9正式版等多款操作系统更新。本次更新引入RCS消息端到端加密测试、欧盟第三方可穿戴设备支持，并例行推出年度彩虹主题壁纸与表盘。

timeline.heading: RC Versions Released
timeline.summary: Apple pushes iOS 26.5 RC, watchOS 26.5 RC, macOS 26.5 RC, and visionOS 26.5 RC, a week after the previous beta. iOS 18.7.9 also goes live.

timeline.heading: Beta 4 Seeds
timeline.summary: Apple seeds fourth beta of iOS 26.5, watchOS 26.5, macOS 26.5, and visionOS 26.5, signaling final testing phase before RC.

timelineEn.heading: RC Versions Released
timelineEn.summary: Apple pushes iOS 26.5 RC, watchOS 26.5 RC, macOS 26.5 RC, and visionOS 26.5 RC, a week after the previous beta. iOS 18.7.9 also goes live.

timelineEn.heading: Beta 4 Seeds
timelineEn.summary: Apple seeds fourth beta of iOS 26.5, watchOS 26.5, macOS 26.5, and visionOS 26.5, signaling final testing phase before RC.

timelineZh.heading: RC版本集中发布
timelineZh.summary: 苹果在距离上一测试版7天后，推送iOS 26.5 RC、watchOS 26.5 RC、macOS 26.5 RC与visionOS 26.5 RC，同时发布iOS 18.7.9正式版。

timelineZh.heading: Beta 4 发布
timelineZh.summary: 苹果发布iOS 26.5、watchOS 26.5、macOS 26.5、visionOS 26.5的第四个测试版，进入RC前的最后测试阶段。

keyDetails: iOS 26.5 RC restarts testing of RCS end-to-end encryption, previously removed in iOS 26.4 beta, aiming to secure cross-platform messaging between iPhone and Android.
EU-specific code enables third-party wearables to pair seamlessly, forward notifications, and support Live Activities, similar to first-party accessories.
Apple Maps adds a 'Suggested Places' feature and introduces auction-based search ads for businesses in the U.S.
watchOS 26.5 RC and iOS 26.5 RC include the 2026 Pride Edition wallpapers and a matching watch face, following the launch of the Pride Edition Sport Loop band.
macOS 26.5 RC and visionOS 26.5 RC focus on bug fixes and performance improvements, with no major new features announced.
iOS 18.7.9 formal release (build 22H355) arrives 12 days after iOS 18.7.8, but Apple has not detailed its fixes.
keyDetailsEn: iOS 26.5 RC restarts testing of RCS end-to-end encryption, previously removed in iOS 26.4 beta, aiming to secure cross-platform messaging between iPhone and Android.
EU-specific code enables third-party wearables to pair seamlessly, forward notifications, and support Live Activities, similar to first-party accessories.
Apple Maps adds a 'Suggested Places' feature and introduces auction-based search ads for businesses in the U.S.
watchOS 26.5 RC and iOS 26.5 RC include the 2026 Pride Edition wallpapers and a matching watch face, following the launch of the Pride Edition Sport Loop band.
macOS 26.5 RC and visionOS 26.5 RC focus on bug fixes and performance improvements, with no major new features announced.
iOS 18.7.9 formal release (build 22H355) arrives 12 days after iOS 18.7.8, but Apple has not detailed its fixes.
keyDetailsZh: iOS 26.5 RC重新开启RCS消息端到端加密测试，该功能曾在iOS 26.4测试版中出现后被移除，旨在提升iPhone与Android用户间的通信隐私。
欧盟地区代码支持第三方可穿戴设备接近式配对、通知转发及实时活动，功能接近第一方配件体验。
苹果地图新增“建议地点”功能，并首次在美国市场引入竞价排名广告机制。
watchOS 26.5 RC与iOS 26.5 RC配套推出2026年度彩虹版表盘及壁纸，与新款彩虹版回环式运动表带同步上线。
macOS 26.5 RC与visionOS 26.5 RC以错误修复和性能提升为主，未公开重大新功能。
iOS 18.7.9正式版（版本号22H355）距上一个正式版12天发布，苹果未公布具体修复细节。
